Ifa Black Disk clansman captive or companion is, brought back to Alpha Complex, Ness-Y is briefly congratulatory — “Better than | ex- pected..." and awards everyone a 58-credit bonus. Next, Meg-O-FUN read a list of assigned equipment, noting anything lost or damaged during the mission. Items may be missing for 4 number of reasons: * abandoned at the test facility because the MTV was so crowded — somebody gets a fine and reprimand * lost or damaged bots — big fines in order unless unavoidable in line of duty * gear given or traded withthe Black Disk clan ‘or the giant cockroaches — Peter says HPD & MC will pay the fine ifthe loss ofthe items Contributed to the success of the mission * gear not recovered from PC or NPC. casu- allies or MIAs (including Grund-G) — fines assessed theld pending investigation in Grund- G's case) Then Samson stands up, reads the list of experimental devices assigned, and asks for test reports. Citizens who failed to test their devices receive reprimands and 25. credit fines. Citizens who lost or damaged devices also pay for replacement ofthe device (a pretty penny for the power suit and the plasma Renerator, for example). If devices.
